title: HATE CRIME REPORTING - 211info
text: FEDERAL BUREAU OF INVESTIGATION HATE CRIME REPORTING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Investigates criminal violations of federal civil rights statutes and hate crimes. Also conducts law enforcement training, public outreach, and partnerships with community groups. 935 Pennsylvania Avenue NW Washington, DC 20535 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (503) 224-4181 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Portland Field Office (503) 224-4181 Seattle Field Office (206) 622-0460 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website to report a crime FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Hate Crimes Reporting Other Services Offered At This Location: LAW ENFORCEMENT AGENCIES - FEDERAL BUREAU OF INVESTIGATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. FEDERAL BUREAU OF INVESTIGATION
